periods.name: This Afternoon

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3am and 4am. Partly cloudy. Low around 69, with temperatures rising to around 72 overnight. South southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 10am and 11am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 5pm. Partly sunny. High near 84, with temperatures falling to around 82 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 12 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
